productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Karsen Blue White Kidswear
description: Compositiontop: Light blue printed sleeveless t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with white ribbing around neckline, grey piping around armholes and appliques near left hem shorts: White shorts made of cotton fabric and elasticated waist, with two insert pockets on the front, two concealed pockets on the back with flaps, two mock pocket flaps on the sides near the hem, print on left leg and embroidered lettering on the back of the right legFittingTop: Regular98 cm (24-30 months)Shorts: Regular98 cm (24-30 months)Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Indulge the little sailor side in your little boy in this blue tee and white shorts combo from gini and jony. The paper boat print, appliques of sailor puppies and paper boats and the repetetive use of the words - sailing, friends and paper - all add to the adventurous spirit of this tee. Team this with the super comfy shorts with the sailor inspired lettering and crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
